narrative: Hot US CPI and crude oil strength drive a sharp USD rally — DXY +0.42% as 175bp Fed-ECB carry pressures EUR/USD below its 200-hour MA to 1.1734. WTI surges +3.29% toward $101 on Trump energy comments, while USD/JPY firms to 157.70 on a 300bp Fed-BoJ spread despite hawkish BoJ anchors; gold lower -0.91%; equities -0.61%; VIX 18.3. Watch RBNZ rate decision May 27.
